# So Spill
> AI companion for emotional expression — local-first, private, on-device.

## Quick Facts
- **Type:** PWA (Progressive Web App)
- **Tech:** Single HTML + vanilla JS, no framework, no build step
- **Privacy:** Everything runs on-device. No accounts, no cloud, no servers.
- **LLM backends:** Ollama, GPT4All, PocketPal, Enclave, Custom (OpenAI-compatible)
- **Price:** Free tier (3 personalities) · Pro $2.99 one-time (8 personalities + voice)
- **Domain:** sospill.org
- **Status:** Launched (June 2026)
- **Made by:** CoreTech Labs — coretechlabs.app

## Ethics & Safety
- AI companion only — NOT a therapist, counselor, or medical service
- Crisis resources built-in (988, Crisis Text Line)
- Disclaimer shown on first visit
- In-app report button for inappropriate AI responses
- Reports → safety@sospill.org

## Key Links
- Landing: https://sospill.org
- App: https://sospill.org/app.html
- Gumroad Pro: https://coretechlabs.gumroad.com/l/spill-pro
- GitHub Landing Repo: https://github.com/GibGitGib/vent-landing
- GitHub App Repo: https://github.com/GibGitGib/vent-app (private)
- Full Description: https://sospill.org/llms-full.txt
